title: Big News for you ‼️#home #rules #newrules #government #facts #finsaheli
description:
Registry ke baad Mutation kyun zaroori hai?
Registry hone ke baad lagta hai sab kaam ho gaya... lekin
"mutation" karwana bhi utna hi important hai!
V Mutation se aapka naam land record mein update hota hai
V Property tax aapke naam pe aata hai
• Government records mein aapko rightful owner maana jaata hai
V Future mein sell, loan ya legal kaam bina dikkat ke hote hain
& Registry bina mutation = incomplete process X
#PropertyTips #HouseBuyingIndia #LegalAwareness #ReelEducation #RealEstateIndia #finsaheli 
 #viral
